artifacts.title: Sales Development Representative (SDR), Mid-Market - North America
artifacts.raw_text: Sales Development Representative (SDR) - Example HR. We are hiring SDRs to build our outbound sales motion targeting mid-market HR and finance leaders in North America. You will partner with Account Executives to source pipeline for our new all-in-one payroll product. This is a leading indicator of an outbound, sales-led motion into the mid-market segment.
artifacts.normalized_text: Sales Development Representative (SDR) - Example HR. We are hiring SDRs to build our outbound sales motion targeting mid-market HR and finance leaders in North America. You will partner with Account Executives to source pipeline for our new all-in-one payroll product. This is a leading indicator of an outbound, sales-led motion into the mid-market segment.

metadata.exa_query: "Example HR" careers OR jobs OR "we're hiring" site:boards.greenhouse.io OR site:jobs.lever.co OR site:linkedin.com/jobs

artifacts.title: Partnerships Manager, EMEA
artifacts.raw_text: Partnerships Manager (EMEA) - Example HR. Example HR is expanding its channel and partner ecosystem. Own relationships with accounting firms and embedded-payroll partners to drive PLG-assisted expansion across EMEA. Prior experience building a partner-led motion in HR or fintech required.
